content: Autonomous curiosity signals from ICM-driven agents can be repurposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization gate for 2025 SOTA active learning agent memory, where only surprising, unresolved observations that trigger intrinsic curiosity are retained in long-form context rather than being evicted based solely on recency or frequency. This creates a self-sustaining active learning loop where the agent’s own intrinsic curiosity drives what it remembers to learn from next.
